# SPIR-V Fragment Shader Binary (Little-Endian)

# Header (5 words)
03022307 00010000 00000000 00000005 00000000

# Capability Shader
00020011 00000001

# MemoryModel Logical GLSL450
0003000e 00000000 00000001

# EntryPoint Fragment %3 "main"
0005000f 00000004 00000003 6e69616d 00000000

# ExecutionMode %3 OriginUpperLeft
00030010 00000003 00000007

# TypeVoid %1
00020013 00000001

# TypeFunction %2 %1
00030021 00000002 00000001

# Function %3 Void None %2
00050036 00000001 00000003 00000000 00000002

# Label %4
000200f8 00000004

# Return
000100fd

# FunctionEnd
00010038
